description: Plamen pipeline watchdog - artifact requirements per phase

recon.gate_message: Recon incomplete. Missing artifacts block Phase 2 instantiation. Ensure all 4 recon agents have completed.

breadth.gate_message: Breadth analysis incomplete. At least 3 analysis_*.md files required before proceeding to inventory.

inventory.gate_message: Findings inventory not created. Cannot proceed to re-scan, semantic invariants, or depth without findings_inventory.md.

rescan.gate_message: Breadth re-scan required in Thorough mode. At least 1 analysis_rescan_*.md file needed.

per_contract.gate_message: Per-contract analysis required in Thorough mode. At least 1 analysis_percontract_*.md file needed.

semantic_invariants.gate_message: Semantic invariants analysis not complete. Required in Core/Thorough mode before depth loop.

scanner_artifacts.description: At least 1 scanner/validation output must exist (any naming convention)

depth.gate_message: Depth loop incomplete. Missing required depth/scanner/validation artifacts.

recovery_hints.depth_*_findings.md: Spawn depth agents (token-flow, state-trace, edge-case, external) per phase4b-depth-templates.md. Each writes depth_{type}_findings.md.
recovery_hints.design_stress_findings.md: Spawn Design Stress Testing agent (sonnet, 1 slot, UNCONDITIONAL in Thorough). Read phase4b-scanner-templates.md Design Stress section.
recovery_hints.perturbation_findings.md: Spawn Finding Perturbation agent (sonnet). Read phase4b-loop.md Perturbation section. Applies DIRECTION_FLIP and other operators to existing findings.
recovery_hints.skill_execution_gaps.md: Spawn Skill Execution Checklist agent (haiku). Read phase4b-loop.md Skill Checklist section. Verifies depth agents executed all skill steps.
recovery_hints.confidence_scores.md: Spawn confidence scoring agent (haiku). Read rules/phase4-confidence-scoring.md for the 4-axis model.
recovery_hints.rag_validation.md: Spawn RAG Validation Sweep agent (sonnet). Read rules/phase4-confidence-scoring.md Phase 4b.5 section. If MCP fails, write floor scores (0.3).

chain.gate_message: Chain analysis incomplete. Missing hypothesis grouping or chain matching artifacts.

verification.gate_message: Verification incomplete. At least 1 verify_*.md file required before report generation.

report.gate_message: Report index not created. Report tier writers cannot proceed without report_index.md.
